'''Bentu Pall Tarlen''' was the head of the [[Imperial Center Construction Contracts Division]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. He had contacts with [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], and provided him information on how to get in on buying possible construction contracts.<ref name="The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref>

He, with other representatives and officials, met with Xizor in [[Xizor's Palace|his palace]] for business discussions, while [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was prisoner there.<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire novel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] </ref>
{{Char-stub}}
